creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
I am closing this PR due to following reasons:

- The submitter was not interested in the port nor in the maintainership anymore
- The submitted port was heavily outdated
- The attempts to update/stagify the port failed - upstream's code is badly written, not really portable and few more experienced committers had issues with getting it to work

Given the demand for the port was nonexistent, there would be a very high cost of keeping it around (work needed to get it working properly) and there was no one happy to maintain it, I am closing this PR.
